violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Pizza scoop handles are stored in the pizza toppings.
Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. Taco meat was thawing in the sink not under running water.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Observed pizza boxes stored on the floor in the pizza kitchen.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Single use pizza boxes were stored on the floor in the kitchen.
